policies.title: Shipping Timelines
policies.content: Standard shipping: 5-7 business days (US), 10-14 business days (international). Express shipping: 2-3 business days (US), 5-7 business days (international). Orders placed before 2 PM EST ship same business day.

policies.title: Tracking and Delays
policies.content: Tracking numbers sent via email within 24 hours of shipment. If tracking shows no movement for 5+ business days, contact support for investigation. Delayed shipments over 14 days qualify for free reshipment or full refund.

policies.title: Damaged or Missing Items
policies.content: Report damaged items within 48 hours of delivery with photos. Missing items reported within 7 days. Replacement shipped within 3 business days at no charge. High-value items (>$500) require signature confirmation.
